scope_boundary: This task proves frontend rendering, browser request construction, read-model/SSE-shaped state, and stateful fixture behavior only. It makes no claim about production backend authentication, authorization, durable storage, real route side effects, restart durability, or authority. Task 6 owns disposable-repository routes, real authority, restart, rollback, and persistence.

The worktree manual QA at the first path above is retained as an unmodified historical report; this record is the canonical current handoff.
